progress_summary: Retrospective token+cost audit of all Claude Code work on opchain. Scanned 1,244 transcripts, matched 418 by cwd (24 main sessions + 394 workflow subagents) across 17 worktree folders; deduped 6,894 raw assistant lines to 2,999 unique message.id records (2.3x inflation avoided), then merged append-safe with 215 retained historical rows. 363,376,590 tokens for $649.59 over 2026-05-26 -> 2026-07-10. Fable 5 is 52.7% of spend; cache-reads are 93% of tokens but a small slice of cost. Spend is concentrated: PR #376 alone is ~41% of total. 6 PRs diverge >20% between per-message and session-dominant attribution. Full tables in reports/token-usage/token-report-2026-07-10.md.
next_actions: Cut real semver v* tags — the by-release breakdown is degenerate with only a wip/ tag.
Investigate PR #376 (largest single-PR spend, ~41% of total) for prompt/caching regressions.
Re-verify claude-opus-4-7 pricing in oc-claude-api before quoting its $5.54 externally — it is [unpriced] in model-routing.md.
Fix the head -1 cwd filter in the task spec; it silently drops scheduled-task sessions.
Re-run weekly; fact table is append-safe on message_id.

skill_state.note: cost.tokens carries only fresh input/output per wire-1.1. Cache buckets (read 365,736,532, write 22,430,767) are priced into total_usd and detailed in aggregates.json.
skill_state.budget_usd: unset — retrospective analysis, no budget ceiling (key omitted: validator rejects null)

progress_table.label: Attribute by model / chat / PR (2 modes) / release
Append-safe merge with prior fact table
Emit report + CSV + aggregates + meta + dashboard export

key_decisions: Manifest built by scanning every line for cwd — the spec's `head -1` filter drops 97 transcripts whose first record is queue-operation/started/ai-title.
Rows keyed on message.id, not transcript line: per-line counting overstates cost ~2.3x.
Cache-write priced per TTL from usage.cache_creation (1.25x for 5m, 2.0x for 1h), not a flat 1.25x.
Fact table merged append-safe rather than overwritten: 215 prior rows cover a window whose transcripts have rotated off disk.
claude-opus-4-7 left [unpriced] — absent from model-routing.md rate table; its cost is carried from the prior epoch.
cost.budget_usd omitted (not null) — scripts/checkpoint.mjs rejects null.
user_preferences: Keep the four token buckets separate everywhere; never merge cache-read into fresh input.
